name: Wife Loves Your Dick
description:
YOUR WIFE LOVES YOUR DICK! LET HER PROVE IT BY NOT BEING A JEALOUS, CONTROLLING PIECE OF SHIT WHEN SHE HAS HER DOCTOR'S APPOINTMENT OR MAYBE SHE'LL CHANGE HER MIND!

Your wife needs to see a doctor after some wild sex. Your job is to not be a bitch about it, or bad stuff will happen.

Guys, I know we've had a lot of good times. I feel like I've given you some scenarios that a few of you have been a little whiny about, so I'm making up for it with this one. This is a heartwarming story about how much more your wife loves your dick compared to all the other dick she's had. You're welcome.

Please, tell me about how your story went and how your wife proved her love for you. Be careful! If you act like a bitch she will get mad! Don't kill the fucking vibe! She's so hot for you!

If you act like a bitch she going to find some dick. Just be cool and you win! I can't stress this enough. Jealousy is a huge turnoff!

Perfect like to dislike ratio! I'm glad everyone loves this bot!
